title: Corpse Slug
move_pattern: Cycles: Whip Slap → Glomp → Goop → (repeat). Starting move is randomized. When multiple Corpse Slugs appear together, each starts at a different point in the cycle.
notes: When multiple Corpse Slugs appear in the same encounter, they are staggered so each one starts its cycle on a different move (Whip Slap, Glomp, or Goop), preventing them from all attacking simultaneously.
